name: DESIGN.md agent guidance
description: Loads selected DESIGN.md files into agent loops as design guidance, DTCG-aligned design tokens, and code-substitution context.

standards.name: Design Tokens Community Group Format Module

capabilities.description: Adds design guidance only when semantic design cues match.
Applies DESIGN.md tokens through plugin-selected providers.
Controls when DESIGN.md guidance enters agent context.

permissions.reason: Reads DESIGN.md assets and can emit transformed target content through an explicit tool.
